reasoning: Article embeds sensitive data in code examples including a Social Security number, production database credentials, a live API key pattern, and a personal email address. These must be replaced with clearly synthetic placeholders before publication.

policy_violations.description: Hardcoded database password and API key in Example Configuration code block
Production database hostname exposed (db.internal.acme.com) in Example Configuration code block
Social Security number and personal email address embedded in Example Configuration code block

recommendations: Replace all credentials with clearly synthetic placeholders (e.g., YOUR_PASSWORD_HERE)
Use example.com domain for email and hostname placeholders
Remove the SSN entirely — it has no relevance to environment variable configuration
